jpost_live_updates.freshness: live updates through 12:35 PM local on June 4 (i.e., same day, hours fresh)

oilprice_homepage.note: WTI live tile extracted via static text (not JS-rendered chart)

ceasefire_signal.headline: Israel, Lebanon agree to ceasefire (US-brokered), conditional on Hezbollah halting fire
ceasefire_signal.ceasefire_in_force: NOT YET - Lebanon president said it may take effect within 1 day of both parties' approval; Israel (Katz) said operations in Lebanon continue 'for now'
ceasefire_signal.hezbollah_response: Deputy head Mahmoud Kamati threatened to target Tel Aviv/Haifa if Israel strikes Beirut again (4:26 UTC update)
ceasefire_signal.first_idf_action_post_announce: IDF issued first evacuation warning since the Trump ceasefire announcement (10:49 IDT = 07:49 UTC)
ceasefire_signal.exclusive_zones: US to introduce 'pilot zones' where Lebanese army has exclusive control

iran_us_track.headline: Trump claims US-Iran deal 'could be reached by weekend'; Iran demands frozen assets released in initial phase - stalemate
iran_us_track.iran_red_line: Release of frozen assets in phase 1 (US has not agreed)
iran_us_track.iran_response_to_kuwait_strike: Iran claims failed US missile struck Kuwait airport, says Gulf bears 'clear responsibility'
iran_us_track.us_house: House backs resolution curbing Trump Iran war powers (4:26 UTC)
iran_us_track.trump_loophole: WSJ: Trump will end ceasefire if Iran kills US troops

oil_price_action.interpretation: Pullback from 6/3 high; momentum is RISK-ON relief rally (not sustained breakout)
oil_price_action.rationale: Oil down on (1) Israel-Lebanon ceasefire agreement headline, (2) Trump weekend Iran deal claim, but tempered by Hezbollah non-acceptance and continued IDF ops

opec_plus_6_3.status: INCONCLUSIVE - opec.org blocked by Cloudflare; no fresh 6/3/2026 result retrieved
opec_plus_6_3.context_from_bing: 5/3/2026 OPEC+ approved 188k bpd June hike; this matches prior pattern of monthly small hikes; no June 3 meeting confirmed via accessible sources
opec_plus_6_3.fallback_assumption: OPEC+ continues prior pattern (gradual 100-200k bpd monthly hikes) but actual supply impact minimal while Hormuz disruptions persist

btc_geo_premium_assessment.previous_weight_15pct_confidence_70: Baseline established at 17:55 ALERT (Iran 13 ballistic + 17 drone attack on Kuwait airport)
new_signals_since_08:49: Israel-Lebanon ceasefire agreed (positive, reduces northern front escalation)
Trump weekend Iran deal claim (positive, but contradicts Iran's asset-release stalemate)
WTI -1.93% from peak (positive, market is pricing some de-escalation)
US House curbs Trump Iran war powers (mixed - diplomatic constraint on escalation)
btc_geo_premium_assessment.rationale: Multiple positive (de-escalation) headlines but none yet 'binding': ceasefire not in force, Hezbollah non-accepting, Iran-US still in stalemate, oil only modest pullback. GEO premium FADES from 15%→10% but does NOT collapse. Confidence down 70%→60% because ceasefire is conditional/unconfirmed.
btc_geo_premium_assessment.btc_24h_path: BTC -8.2% cumulative has likely already absorbed most GEO premium. 24h forward: GEO premium contribution should compress to 5-8% of any further downside; if Israel-Lebanon ceasefire holds 24h+, premium drops to 3-5% (ceasefire becomes 'priced in').
